zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph de Grendon於1270年出生在英國瓦維其可爾格倫登時，他的父親Sir Robert II Grendon - Justice of Assize, Knight70歲，母親Emma Bassett56歲。他於1294年與Johanna Burnell在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1332年1月20日在他的家鄉享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph de Grendon于1270年出生在英国瓦維其可爾格倫登时，他的父亲Sir Robert II Grendon - Justice of Assize, Knight70岁，母亲Emma Bassett56岁。他于1294年与Johanna Burnell在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1332年1月20日在他的家乡享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grendon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Grendon (in Witheridge and in Tavistock, Devon), Grendon (Northants, Warwicks), Grendon Underwood (Bucks), Grendon Bishop, Grendon Warren (Herefs), or Grindon (Durham, Northumb, Staffs).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph de Grendon was born in 1270, in Grendon, Warwickshire, England, his father, Sir Robert II Grendon - Justice of Assize, Knight, was 70 and his mother, Emma Bassett, was 56. He married Johanna Burnell in 1294, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 20 January 1332, in his hometown, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph de Grendon est né en 1270, à Grendon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert II Grendon - Justice of Assize, Knight, avait 70 ans et sa mère, Emma Bassett, avait 56 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Burnell en 1294, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 janvier 1332, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph de Grendon 1270 in Grendon, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert II Grendon - Justice of Assize, Knight 70 und seine Mutter Emma Bassett 56. Er hat 1294 in England Johanna Burnell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. Januar 1332 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph de Grendon è nato il nel 1270 nel Grendon, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert II Grendon - Justice of Assize, Knight, aveva 70 anni e il suo madre, Emma Bassett, aveva 56 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Burnell nel 1294, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 gennaio 1332, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Grendonが1270年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアグレンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert II Grendon - Justice of Assize, Knightは70歳，母Emma Bassettは56歳であった。1294年にイギリスでJohanna Burnellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1332年1月20日に故郷で62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Grendon(이)가 1270년 영국 워윅실르 그렌던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert II Grendon - Justice of Assize, Knight(은)는 70세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma Bassett(은)는 56세였다. 그는 1294년 영국에서 Johanna Burnell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년 1월 20일 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph de Grendon nasceu em 1270, em Grendon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert II Grendon - Justice of Assize, Knight, tinha 70 anos e sua mãe, Emma Bassett, tinha 56 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Burnell em 1294, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de janeiro de 1332, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph de Grendon родился в 1270 г. в местности грендон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert II Grendon - Justice of Assize, Knight было 70 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Bassett, 56. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Burnell в 1294 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 января 1332 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph de Grendon nació en 1270, en Grendon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert II Grendon - Justice of Assize, Knight, tenía 70 años y su mamá, Emma Bassett, tenía 56 años. Se casó con Johanna Burnell en 1294, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de enero de 1332, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años.
